title: Breaking Wind
headline: The Real Heisenberg's Gas
caption:
The periodic table just got a bit more chaotic. If you think farts are funny, this shirt is for you. Unleash your inner chemistry professor while embracing the world’s oldest gag. Get yours and let the winds of change blow through your wardrobe. Link in bio.

#BreakingWind #FartHumor #TVParody #BreakingBad #FashionForImmatureAdults
alt_text: T-shirt design featuring a parody of Breaking Bad with a fart theme.
